title: We Can Source It Ltd - Set of 6 Chafing Fuel Cans - 6 Hour Burn, Non-Flammable Liquid Wick Fuel - Safe, Re-Lightable, Cool-Touch Cans for Bain Maries, Chafing Dishes, Buffets & Catering Events
features: 𝐋𝐎𝐍𝐆-𝐋𝐀𝐒𝐓𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐁𝐔𝐑𝐍 𝐓𝐈𝐌𝐄: Available in 4- or 6-hour burn time options. Each fuel canister provides up to 4 to 6 hours of consistent heat, making it ideal for extended catering events, buffet service, or parties. Keeps food warm and fresh throughout service without interruption.

𝐒𝐀𝐅𝐄 & 𝐍𝐎𝐍-𝐅𝐋𝐀𝐌𝐌𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐍: Made with pure Diethylene Glycol, this chafing fuel burns cleanly with a consistent flame. It's non-flammable in its liquid state, offering a safer alternative for busy kitchens and catering setups.

𝐂𝐎𝐎𝐋-𝐓𝐎𝐔𝐂𝐇 𝐑𝐄-𝐋𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐓𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐂𝐀𝐍𝐈𝐒𝐓𝐄𝐑: Features a safe-to-touch metal container and a re-lightable wick, allowing full fuel use. Even when alight, the container remains cool, ensuring easy and safe handling during service.

𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐋𝐄 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐂𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐍𝐆 & 𝐄𝐕𝐄𝐍𝐓𝐒: Ideal for chafing dishes, bain-maries, fondue sets, marshmallow toasters, and more. Perfect for hotels, restaurants, outdoor events, and home entertaining. Compatible with most food warming equipment.

𝐂𝐋𝐄𝐀𝐍 & 𝐎𝐃𝐎𝐑-𝐅𝐑𝐄𝐄 𝐇𝐄𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐒𝐎𝐋𝐔𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍: Burns with a clean, low-odor flame that preserves the quality and aroma of your food. A reliable and efficient heat source that’s suitable for both indoor and outdoor catering environments.

Our chafing fuel offers reliable burn times of either 4 or 6 hours, allowing you to choose the perfect duration for your event or catering needs. Is this chafing fuel safe to use indoors? Yes, it’s formulated with non-flammable, pure diethylene glycol and designed for safe indoor and outdoor use, providing clean, odour-free heat. Does this chafing fuel produce smoke or unpleasant odours? No, it burns cleanly without smoke or odour, making it ideal for indoor events, buffets, and catering where food aroma matters. What pack sizes are available for this chafing fuel? We offer a variety of convenient pack sizes to suit your needs, including 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 12, and 24 cans, perfect for both small gatherings and large events. Can the fuel be reused or handled while burning? Yes. While the fuel is single-use, the wick is re-lightable for maximum efficiency. The metal container remains cool to the touch during use, allowing safe and easy handling even while lit.
